scripts.sync-music: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});const tracks=[['Hardline_Pursuit.mp4','Hardline_Pursuit.mp4'],['Room-Ready Match (2).mp3','lobby.mp3']];for(const [src,dst] of tracks){const s=p.resolve('..',src);if(fs.existsSync(s))fs.copyFileSync(s,p.join('public',dst));else console.warn('music track not found at',s);}const stems=['vocals','drums','bass','percussion','synth','other'];const stemDir=p.join('public','stems','battle');fs.mkdirSync(stemDir,{recursive:true});for(const name of stems){const s=p.resolve('..','stems',name+'.mp3');if(fs.existsSync(s))fs.copyFileSync(s,p.join(stemDir,name+'.mp3'));else console.warn('stem not found at',s);}"
